name: star critters- JADE RABBIT
description:
This design is goated...Her left eye has some dark lore....

Warning: blood

Ok so here's how it happened Wishin and Jade played meteor moss a lot back then before... "yknow." Jade was a lot more competitive than Wishin and would find ways to make the game more difficult. Wishin tried keeping up with her, but he missed the meteor and ended up shooting her instead...
